description: Style NoteWith reference to beach lifestyle, reminiscent of the sun, sand and surf, this pair of shorts from puma is tailored to be worn low on the hips. The print is balanced with a minimal, fuss-free cut. Wear this with a monochrome tee in shades of green or blue. Product DetailsBlack shorts with inbuilt mesh, elasticated waistband with drawstrings on the inside, brand tab appliqued on the right pocket, blue paneling on the sides and branding on the left legMaterial and Care100% polyester shell and liningMachine wash inside outDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanCool iron inside outSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32")  is wearing a size M
